```python
import scanpy as sc
import squidpy as sq
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Load the data
adata = sc.read_h5ad('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/Data/mouse_brain/mouse_brain.h5ad')

# Make variable names unique
adata.var_names_make_unique()

print(f"Loaded data: {adata.shape[0]} cells x {adata.shape[1]} genes")
print(f"Available cell types: {adata.obs['celltype'].value_counts()}")

# Set up spatial coordinates in obsm if not already there
if 'spatial' not in adata.obsm.keys():
    adata.obsm['spatial'] = adata.obs[['x', 'y']].values

# Build spatial neighborhood graph
sq.gr.spatial_neighbors(adata, coord_type='generic', delaunay=True, n_neighs=6)

print(f"Built spatial neighborhood graph with {adata.obsp['spatial_connectivities'].nnz} edges")

# Calculate neighborhood enrichment - which cell types tend to be neighbors
sq.gr.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key='celltype')

# Calculate spatial autocorrelation for cell types
sq.gr.spatial_autocorr(adata, mode='moran', n_perms=100, n_jobs=1)

# Find spatial clusters/domains using leiden clustering on spatial graph
sc.tl.leiden(adata, adjacency=adata.obsp['spatial_connectivities'], resolution=0.5, key_added='spatial_domains')

print(f"Identified {len(adata.obs['spatial_domains'].unique())} spatial domains")
print(f"Spatial domains distribution: {adata.obs['spatial_domains'].value_counts().sort_index()}")

# Calculate centrality scores to identify spatial hubs
sq.gr.centrality_scores(adata, cluster_key='celltype')

# Save results
adata.write('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q20/run_0/output.h5ad')

# Print summary
print("\n=== SPATIAL NEIGHBORHOOD ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===")
print(f"Dataset: {adata.shape[0]} cells across {len(adata.obs['celltype'].unique())} cell types")
print(f"Spatial connectivity: {adata.obsp['spatial_connectivities'].nnz} neighbor pairs identified")
print(f"Spatial domains: {len(adata.obs['spatial_domains'].unique())} distinct neighborhoods found")

# Show neighborhood enrichment results
if 'nhood_enrichment' in adata.uns:
    enrichment = adata.uns['nhood_enrichment']['zscore']
    print(f"\nTop cell type co-localizations (z-score > 2):")
    mask = enrichment > 2
    for i in range(enrichment.shape[0]):
        for j in range(enrichment.shape[1]):
            if mask.iloc[i,j] and i != j:
                print(f"  {enrichment.index[i]} <-> {enrichment.columns[j]}: {enrichment.iloc[i,j]:.2f}")

# Show spatial autocorrelation results
if 'moranI' in adata.uns:
    moran_results = adata.uns['moranI']
    significant_types = [ct for ct, pval in zip(moran_results.index, moran_results['pval_norm']) if pval < 0.05]
    print(f"\nCell types with significant spatial clustering (p<0.05): {len(significant_types)}")
    for ct in significant_types[:5]:  # Show top 5
        idx = list(moran_results.index).index(ct)
        print(f"  {ct}: Moran's I = {moran_results.iloc[idx]['I']:.3f}, p = {moran_results.iloc[idx]['pval_norm']:.3e}")

print(f"\nResults saved to output.h5ad")
print("Added to adata:")
print("  - .obsp['spatial_connectivities']: spatial neighbor graph")
print("  - .obs['spatial_domains']: spatial domain assignments")
print("  - .uns['nhood_enrichment']: cell type co-localization scores")
print("  - .uns['moranI']: spatial autocorrelation statistics")
print("  - .obs['centrality_scores']: spatial centrality measures")
```

import scanpy as sc
import squidpy as sq
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Load the data
adata = sc.read_h5ad('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/Data/mouse_brain/mouse_brain.h5ad')

# Make variable names unique
adata.var_names_make_unique()

print(f"Loaded data: {adata.shape[0]} cells x {adata.shape[1]} genes")
print(f"Available cell types: {adata.obs['celltype'].value_counts()}")

# Set up spatial coordinates in obsm if not already there
if 'spatial' not in adata.obsm.keys():
    adata.obsm['spatial'] = adata.obs[['x', 'y']].values

# Build spatial neighborhood graph
sq.gr.spatial_neighbors(adata, coord_type='generic', delaunay=True, n_neighs=6)

print(f"Built spatial neighborhood graph with {adata.obsp['spatial_connectivities'].nnz} edges")

# Calculate neighborhood enrichment - which cell types tend to be neighbors
sq.gr.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key='celltype')

# Calculate spatial autocorrelation for cell types
sq.gr.spatial_autocorr(adata, mode='moran', n_perms=100, n_jobs=1)

# Find spatial clusters/domains using leiden clustering on spatial graph
sc.tl.leiden(adata, adjacency=adata.obsp['spatial_connectivities'], resolution=0.5, key_added='spatial_domains')

print(f"Identified {len(adata.obs['spatial_domains'].unique())} spatial domains")
print(f"Spatial domains distribution: {adata.obs['spatial_domains'].value_counts().sort_index()}")

# Calculate centrality scores to identify spatial hubs
sq.gr.centrality_scores(adata, cluster_key='celltype')

# Save results
adata.write('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q20/run_0/output.h5ad')

# Print summary
print("\n=== SPATIAL NEIGHBORHOOD ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===")
print(f"Dataset: {adata.shape[0]} cells across {len(adata.obs['celltype'].unique())} cell types")
print(f"Spatial connectivity: {adata.obsp['spatial_connectivities'].nnz} neighbor pairs identified")
print(f"Spatial domains: {len(adata.obs['spatial_domains'].unique())} distinct neighborhoods found")

# Show neighborhood enrichment results
if 'nhood_enrichment' in adata.uns:
    enrichment = adata.uns['nhood_enrichment']['zscore']
    print(f"\nTop cell type co-localizations (z-score > 2):")
    mask = enrichment > 2
    for i in range(enrichment.shape[0]):
        for j in range(enrichment.shape[1]):
            if mask.iloc[i,j] and i != j:
                print(f"  {enrichment.index[i]} <-> {enrichment.columns[j]}: {enrichment.iloc[i,j]:.2f}")

# Show spatial autocorrelation results
if 'moranI' in adata.uns:
    moran_results = adata.uns['moranI']
    significant_types = [ct for ct, pval in zip(moran_results.index, moran_results['pval_norm']) if pval < 0.05]
    print(f"\nCell types with significant spatial clustering (p<0.05): {len(significant_types)}")
    for ct in significant_types[:5]:  # Show top 5
        idx = list(moran_results.index).index(ct)
        print(f"  {ct}: Moran's I = {moran_results.iloc[idx]['I']:.3f}, p = {moran_results.iloc[idx]['pval_norm']:.3e}")

print(f"\nResults saved to output.h5ad")
print("Added to adata:")
print("  - .obsp['spatial_connectivities']: spatial neighbor graph")
print("  - .obs['spatial_domains']: spatial domain assignments")
print("  - .uns['nhood_enrichment']: cell type co-localization scores")
print("  - .uns['moranI']: spatial autocorrelation statistics")
print("  - .obs['centrality_scores']: spatial centrality measures")
